query: select DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(`startedAt` / 1000), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00'), count(*), sum(case when `status` = 'answered' then 1 else 0 end), sum(case when `status` != 'answered' then 1 else 0 end), coalesce(avg(duration), 0) from `call_logs` where (`call_logs`.`userId` = 1 and `call_logs`.`startedAt` >= 1773780567214) group by DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(`call_logs`.`startedAt` / 1000), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00') order by DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(`call_logs`.`startedAt` / 1000), '%Y-%m-%d %H:00') LIMIT 5;
